case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. RUBENS ALVES FERREIRA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO COLLECTION LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT RUBENS ALVES FERREIRA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAITIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, RUBENS ALVES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
